headline: Short Supply Hits Silver for 6th Straight Year: 2 Winning Stocks to Own Now
summary: Silver enters 2026 facing its sixth straight annual structural deficit. The Silver Institute’s World Silver Survey 2026 projects a 46.3 million-ounce shortfall—15% wider than the 40.3 million ounces recorded in 2025.
